title: Arkivoc
body: Arkivoc (Archive for Organic Chemistry) is a peer-reviewed open access scientific journal covering all aspects of organic chemistry. It is published by the non-profit organization Arkat USA, which was established in 2000 through a personal donation from Alan R. Katritzky and Linde Katritzky. Arkivoc is the primary publication of Arkat USA. According to the Journal Citation Reports, the journal has a 2014 impact factor of 1.165, ranking it 37th out of 57 journals in the category "Chemistry, Organic".
categories: Articles with outdated impact factors from 2018
